title: Cobblemon Beyond Server Pack
description: A Mod Pack For The Cobblemon Beyond Server
body:
Cobblemon Beyond is a mod pack for The Cobblemon Beyond Server.

The Goal of the pack is to Collect and battle Pokemon along with other players on a server or alone in a single player world Collect Pokemon Battle with them to level up and eventualy Evolve into Stronger Forms Feel free to join our Discord Discord link https://discord.gg/D6nggpH9tZ This Pack Uses a Lot of data Packs From Cobblever Modpack is mostly for privet use

please always use the Latest version of Cobblemon https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon
